response.justification: Bogdan Szabo's background is heavily focused on software development, web/mobile applications, and general IT projects with no direct experience in hardware optimization, AI accelerators, SoC/IP modeling, or deep-learning workload analysis. His expertise in high-level software and embedded systems is not aligned with the Principal Performance Architect role's requirements for cloud infrastructure, hardware-software co-design, or AI accelerator optimization.
strengths: Strong background in full-stack software development and system architecture
Experience with high-performance languages (C, C++, D) and optimization techniques
Proven ability to design, build, and maintain scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, real-time microservices)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with AI accelerators, SoC/IP modeling, or hardware optimization
Lacks required qualifications for the role (e.g., PhD/advanced degree in relevant field or equivalent experience in hardware/AI domains)
No evidence of performance bottleneck analysis for deep-learning workloads or GPU architecture expertise
